notes: Deal Backend Tenant Isolation & Audit Logging. B-01 fixed: repository findById/delete enforce tenantId, threaded through OpportunityService, CloseDealWon/LostUseCase, TaskService.validateOpportunityAssignment. B-02 fixed: audit logging (7 mutations: create/update/delete/moveStage + pipeline updateStage/updateAll/resetToDefaults). B-03 confirmed already fixed. moveStage captures previousStage before mutation. 3 dedicated test files added (tenant-isolation, audit-logging, repo-tenant). 248 tests pass across 9 test files. Code audit findings 1-4 all addressed.

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/opportunity && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/adapters exec vitest run __tests__/PrismaOpportunityRepository && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/application exec vitest run src/services/__tests__/OpportunityService
